data.body:
[HAPPY 100th Day Gift from Schale🎁]

Sensei, Schale prepared a celebration gift to celebrate your 100th day!

Please check your mailbox for your gift of Pyroxene x1,200!
(Available until 2/23/2022 14:59 PM.(UTC))
